channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How Democrats could choose a new Maine Senate nominee if Platner withdraws
item.description: Democrats have a short period to replace Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner on the ballot if he exits the race amid a sexual assault...

item.title: Former judge avoids prison after conviction for obstructing immigration agents
item.description: U.S. District Judge Lynn Adelman imposed a $5,000 fine.

item.title: LIVE: ABC News Live
item.description: Round-the-clock coverage of breaking news and live events

item.title: Trump says U.S. will grant Ukraine right to produce Patriot missiles
item.description: President Trump stated on Wednesday that the U.S. will approve Ukraine's request for a production license to build Patriot missile interceptors for defense.
